log.note: Added gradient direction, power curve, and smoothness step controls. Deduplicated engine SVG icons.
Fixed search bar underline focus bug. Separated script into NewTabJS.js.
Fixed shortcut icon URL auto-populating incorrectly. Added autocomplete=off.
Fixed vertical dots button orientation and shortcut click propagation.
Fixed missing grid.appendChild in shortcuts. Added safe JSON parsing.
File-based auto-update system using Updates.json and IndexedDB folder handle.
NewTab background auto-update via chrome.runtime.reload(), Updates.json format, improved link folder UI.
